grants.name: Malaysia Digital Catalyst Grant (MDCG)
grants.objective: Catalyse co-creation, problem-solving, development and commercialisation of disruptive and sustainable solutions with end-user partners within Malaysia Digital promoted sectors.
tech_enablers: Artificial Intelligence and Big Data Analytics
Integrated Circuit design and embedded software
Advanced network connectivity and telecommunication technology

grant_amount.local_owned_company: Up to 50% of total project cost or RM1,000,000 (whichever is lower)
grant_amount.majority_foreign_owned_company: Up to 30% of total project cost or RM1,000,000 (whichever is lower)

local_company: Incorporated in Malaysia under Companies Act 1965/2016
majority_foreign_company: Incorporated in Malaysia under Companies Act 1965/2016
other: Must be MD or MSC Malaysia status company
No clawback dues to MDEC from prior grants

specific_conditions: Applicant/recipient must have no ownership/control relationship with end-user partner
Project must demonstrate new IP creation and/or commercial value
application_documents_required: Proof of completion/non-overlap for past/on-going government grants
application_process: Register and log in to Malaysia Digital Platform
Create New Application and select Grant
Fill form and upload required supporting documents

grants.name: Digital Content Grant (DCG) - Main
grants.overview: Government initiative (started in 2016) to support local creative content companies in animation, digital games, digital comics, and creative technology.
application_process: Register and log in to Malaysia Digital Platform
Create New Application and select Grant
Fill out application and upload documents
eligible_expenses_summary: Direct project salary costs (with role exclusions)
Outsourcing (subject to cap and non-related-party conditions)
non_eligible_expenses_summary: Debt, penalties, litigation and bank/FX related charges

faq_highlights.termination_risk: Breach/non-delivery can trigger grant termination, clawback, and potential blacklist.

grants.name: DCG Mini Grant
grants.purpose: Support development, production and commercialisation of digital content products.
grants.grant_assistance: Up to 100% of project cost or ceiling amount (whichever is lower)
key_eligibility_summary: Company revenue not more than RM3 million (where applicable)
MD or MSC Malaysia status required for company category
Not current recipient of MDEC/FINAS/MyCreative grant
notable_conditions: One grant application per project at a time for common ownership
Past recipients generally reapply after 1-year cooling period

grants.name: DCG Prime Grant
grants.purpose: Support development, production and commercialisation of digital content products.
grants.grant_assistance: Up to 100% of project cost or ceiling amount (whichever is lower)
key_eligibility_summary: Local registered company incorporated at least 1 year
Company revenue not more than RM5 million
Must be MD or MSC Malaysia status company
Not current recipient of MDEC/FINAS/MyCreative grant
notable_conditions: One grant application per project at a time for common shareholders
Past recipient cooling period and compliance checks apply

grants.name: DCG Marketing and Commercialisation Grant
grants.purpose: Commercialise digital content products through marketing/promotion and market deals.
grants.grant_assistance: Up to 100% of project cost or ceiling amount (whichever is lower)
required_output_examples: Feedback from at least two commercial organisations
Minimum two pitching sessions to buyers/investors
key_eligibility_summary: Local registered company incorporated at least 1 year
Must be MD or MSC Malaysia status company
Not current recipient of MDEC/FINAS/MyCreative grant

grants.name: Malaysia Digital X-Port Grant (MDXG)
grants.objective: Support export-ready Malaysian tech companies to expand globally and commercialise high-value digital exports.

grant_amount.local_owned_company: Up to 50% of total project cost or RM1,000,000 (whichever is lower)
grant_amount.majority_foreign_owned_company: Up to 30% of total project cost or RM1,000,000 (whichever is lower), HQ in Malaysia

eligibility_summary: Local: min RM50,000 issued share capital and 51% Malaysian equity
Majority foreign-owned: min RM500,000 issued share capital and HQ in Malaysia
MD or MSC Malaysia status company
Past/on-going grant compliance and non-overlap requirements apply
specific_conditions: Project must result in export commercial value
application_documents_required_summary: Pitch deck, audited accounts, board resolution, company profile and project proposal
Additional information as requested by MDEC

grants.name: Malaysia Digital Acceleration Grant - Artificial Intelligence (MDAG-AI)
grants.status_note: Application Closed (page notes open window until 18 July 2025)
grants.objective: Accelerate growth of MD companies developing and commercialising AI solutions with high national impact.
grants.incentive_amount: Up to 70% of total cost or RM2,000,000 (whichever is lower)
scope_of_evaluation: Value proposition including local spillover and export/jobs
Other factors such as academia linkage
eligibility_summary: Incorporated in Malaysia and min issued share capital RM50,000
MD/MSC status company (or active MD application)
Must have AI products/services in Foundation, Enabling, or Application layer
No on-going MDEC/other government grant (with stated exceptions/requirements)
grants.specific_condition: Recipient must maintain approved MD or MSC Malaysia status throughout grant period or by final disbursement.
application_process: Submit company details and supporting documents
eligible_expenses_summary: Full-time employee salaries tied to KPI
non_eligible_expenses_summary: General outsourcing outside stated design/manufacturing item
IP filing, maintenance, general operating overheads
